channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: City Council debates expanding Fair Fares as enrollment challenges persist
item.description: City Council Speaker Julie Menin criticized Mayor Zohran Mamdani’s administration over the limited reach of the existing Fair Fares program, a transit discount initiative for low-income New Yorkers. M...

item.title: Supreme Court asked whether it can guide Parliament on choosing Election Commission chief
item.description: The issue revolves around whether the judiciary, particularly the Supreme Court of India, has the authority to guide Parliament on the selection process of the Chief Election Commissioner. This questi...

item.title: Calgary lawyer faces multiple charges related to child sexual exploitation
item.description: An Alberta lawyer, Jordan Randall Bonner, 46, has been charged with multiple child sexual exploitation offences after allegedly engaging in sexually explicit communications with youths aged 11 to 15 o...

item.title: Kaizer Chiefs Draw with Sundowns Boosts Pirates in PSL Title Race
item.description: Kaizer Chiefs managed a resilient 1–1 draw against Mamelodi Sundowns in a Betway Premiership clash at Loftus Versfeld on Wednesday night, giving Orlando Pirates a potential edge in the race for the PS...

item.title: Nikita Tszyu defeats Diaz in sixth-round knockout amid contentious moments
item.description: Australian boxer Nikita Tszyu secured a sixth-round knockout victory against Diaz in a bout that drew attention not only for Tszyu's performance but also for some controversial moments during the figh...

item.title: Evaluating the Public and Private Roles in Canadian Airports
item.description: The article discusses the debate over the potential privatization of Canadian airports, sparked by the federal government's plan to assess 'opportunities to unlock the full value of airports.' Chris S...

item.title: Raptors GM Highlights Team Progress Despite Early Playoff Exit
item.description: Toronto Raptors’ general manager Bobby Webster expressed pride in his team's progress during the recent NBA season, which saw the Raptors achieve a 46-36 record, improving by 16 wins compared to the p...

item.title: KUCCPS Urges Students to Submit Applications Before Midnight to Avoid Missing University Placement
item.description: Kenya Universities and Colleges Central Placement Service (KUCCPS) has issued an urgent call to 2025 KCSE candidates to finalise their applications before the portal closes at midnight on May 6, 2026....

item.title: JP Morgan executive faces sexual misconduct allegations in lawsuit; witnesses provide testimonies
item.description: JP Morgan Chase is embroiled in a high-profile lawsuit in New York involving allegations that a senior female executive, Lorna Hajdini, coerced a male colleague, Chirayu Rana, into sexual acts over se...

item.title: Dr Job Obwaka’s Burial Plans Announced as Widow Attends Funeral
item.description: Veteran obstetrician and gynaecologist Dr Job Obwaka passed away on May 1, 2026, after suffering a heart attack in Milimani, Kitengel. Despite being rushed to Nairobi Hospital, he was pronounced dead ...

item.title: Australia to Boost Online Counter-Terrorism Efforts Targeting Youth Radicalisation
item.description: The Australian government is set to ramp up online counter-terrorism efforts amid growing concerns about youth radicalisation. Under a new $74 million initiative, ASIO and federal police will jointly ...

item.title: Two Hikers Sustain Injuries in Yellowstone Bear Encounter
item.description: Two hikers were seriously injured in a bear attack in Yellowstone National Park this week, prompting temporary trail closures in the area. The incident occurred on Monday afternoon near the Mystic Fal...

item.title: Kenya Meteorological Department Forecasts Rainfall Across Multiple Regions for the Next Five Days
item.description: The Kenya Meteorological Department has released a five-day weather forecast covering different parts of the country. From Wednesday, May 6, to Sunday, May 10, heavy rainfall is expected in the Highla...

item.title: Comelec Grants Accreditation to MILF-Linked Political Party for Bangsamoro Elections
item.description: The Commission on Elections (Comelec) has officially accredited the United Bangsamoro Justice Party (UBJP), the political party associated with the Moro Islamic Liberation Front (MILF), allowing forme...

item.title: Trump claims military assistance prevented autocorrect errors in social media posts
item.description: During an event for Military Mothers with First Lady Melania Trump, former President Donald Trump revealed that he enlisted the help of the military to stop autocorrect from mistakenly changing his wi...

item.title: Andy Burnham to speak at cross-party progressive event despite Labour concerns
item.description: Andy Burnham, the Mayor of Greater Manchester and potential challenger to Labour leader Keir Starmer, has drawn criticism from some Labour MPs by agreeing to speak at the Change:Now event later this m...

item.title: Researchers Link Time Crystals to Mechanical Systems for Quantum Applications
item.description: Scientists at Aalto University's Department of Applied Physics have successfully connected a time crystal to an external device, marking a significant milestone in quantum physics. Time crystals are a...

item.title: Children as young as 10 arrested amid sectarian disorder in Londonderry
item.description: Police in Londonderry have reported that children as young as 10 have been involved in several nights of disorder in areas including Bishop Street, The Fountain, and Nailors Row. A 13-year-old boy was...

item.title: Calgary Lawyer Faces Multiple Charges Including Child Luring and Sexual Exploitation
item.description: Jordan Bonner, a 46-year-old criminal defence lawyer from Calgary, has been charged with child luring and sexual exploitation offences, following a previous criminal harassment charge against a police...

item.title: Three passengers evacuated from cruise ship after hantavirus cases reported
item.description: Three individuals were evacuated from a cruise ship after cases of hantavirus were reported onboard. The incident took place amid ongoing concerns about the spread of infectious diseases on cruise shi...
